message:
feat(showcase): mermaid harness telemetry, dense flow sample, and tour landing UI

Mermaid showcase (mermaid_showcase.rs):
- New MermaidHarnessFrameTelemetry struct captures per-frame metrics:
  sample_id, sample_family, diagram_type, tier, glyph_mode, cache_hit,
  checksum, render_time_ms (parse/layout/route/render breakdown),
  warnings, guard_triggers, config hashes, capability_profile, link
  count/mode, and legend_height.
- harness_frame_telemetry() method computes telemetry from current
  showcase state for JSONL emission.
- Feature coverage expanded: Flow Basic sample now covers linkStyle,
  init-directives, and click-link features. Flow Subgraphs updated to
  BT layout direction. New Flow Dense sample exercises dotted/thick/
  bidirectional edges, endpoint markers, and RL direction.
- FEATURE_GAPS reduced: removed 7 entries that are now covered by the
  Dense and updated Flow samples.
- KNOWN_FEATURE_TAGS expanded with 9 new tags matching the new coverage.

App (app.rs):
- MermaidHarnessModel::write_frame() now accepts telemetry struct and
  emits rich JSONL with 25+ fields per frame event.
- Tour landing UI: tour_landing_start_step field with clamping and
  adjustment methods, allowing users to pick which step to resume from.
- start_tour() now clamps start_step to valid range.
- SwitchScreen to GuidedTour properly stops active tour before showing
  landing screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
